units.source_text: 下表列⽰按未折現基準計算所有與本⾦及未來票息付款有關的現⾦流（唯交易⽤途負債及並非視作對沖⽤途的衍⽣⼯具除外）。因此，下表所⽰款
units.translation_target_text: The following table sets out on an undiscounted basis all cash flows related to principal and future coupon payments (except for trading liabilities and derivatives not considered for hedging purposes). Therefore, the items shown in the table below
units.translation_en: The following table sets out on an undiscounted basis all cash flows related to principal and future coupon payments (except for trading liabilities and derivatives not considered for hedging purposes). Therefore, the items shown in the table below

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The following table sets out on an undiscounted basis all cash flows related to principal and future coupon payments (except for trading liabilities and derivatives not considered for hedging purposes). Therefore, the items shown in the table below

units.source_text: 額不會與綜合資產負債表的款額直接對應。就對沖⽤途衍⽣⼯具負債應付之未折現現⾦流乃根據合約期限分類。交易⽤途負債及並非視作對沖⽤途
units.translation_target_text: Amounts do not correspond directly to amounts on the consolidated balance sheet. Undiscounted cash flows payable in respect of derivative liabilities for hedging purposes are classified based on the contractual term. Trading liabilities and not considered for hedging purposes
units.translation_en: Amounts do not correspond directly to amounts on the consolidated balance sheet. Undiscounted cash flows payable in respect of derivative liabilities for hedging purposes are classified based on the contractual term. Trading liabilities and not considered for hedging purposes

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Amounts do not correspond directly to amounts on the consolidated balance sheet. Undiscounted cash flows payable in respect of derivative liabilities for hedging purposes are classified based on the contractual term. Trading liabilities and not considered for hedging purposes

units.source_text: 的衍⽣⼯具均計入「1個⽉內到期」⼀欄，⽽並非按合約期限列⽰。
units.translation_target_text: Derivatives are included in the "due within 1 month" column, rather than listed by contract period.
units.translation_en: Derivatives are included in the "due within 1 month" column, rather than listed by contract period.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Derivatives are included in the "due within 1 month" column, rather than listed by contract period.

units.source_text: 此外，貸款及其他信貸相關承諾以及⾦融擔保⼀般不在資產負債表確認。在貸款及其他信貸相關承諾以及⾦融擔保項下可能應付之未折現現⾦流，
units.translation_target_text: In addition, loans and other credit-related commitments and financial guarantees are generally not recognized on the balance sheet. Undiscounted cash flows that may be payable under loans and other credit-related commitments and financial guarantees,

units.source_text: 均按其可被要求付款的最早⽇期分類。

units.source_text: 滙豐控股的流動資⾦主要來源是：向附屬公司收取的股息、集團內部貸款及證券的利息和還款，以及⾃有流動資⾦賺取的利息。滙豐控股亦在債務
units.translation_target_text: HSBC Holdings' main sources of liquidity are: dividends collected from subsidiaries, interest and repayments on intra-group loans and securities, and interest earned on its own liquidity. HSBC Holdings is also in debt
units.translation_en: HSBC Holdings' main sources of liquidity are: dividends collected from subsidiaries, interest and repayments on intra-group loans and securities, and interest earned on its own liquidity. HSBC Holdings is also in debt

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: HSBC Holdings' main sources of liquidity are: dividends collected from subsidiaries, interest and repayments on intra-group loans and securities, and interest earned on its own liquidity. HSBC Holdings is also in debt

units.source_text: 資本市場籌集資⾦，以符合集團的⾃有資⾦及合資格負債的最低規定，並維持合適的流動資⾦緩衝。滙豐控股運⽤此等流動資⾦履⾏其責任，包括
units.translation_target_text: Funds are raised from the capital markets to meet the minimum requirements of the Group's own funds and qualifying liabilities and to maintain appropriate liquidity buffers. HSBC Holdings uses this liquidity to meet its obligations, including
units.translation_en: Funds are raised from the capital markets to meet the minimum requirements of the Group's own funds and qualifying liabilities and to maintain appropriate liquidity buffers. HSBC Holdings uses this liquidity to meet its obligations, including

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Funds are raised from the capital markets to meet the minimum requirements of the Group's own funds and qualifying liabilities and to maintain appropriate liquidity buffers. HSBC Holdings uses this liquidity to meet its obligations, including

units.source_text: ⽀付對外債務利息及償還本⾦、應付營業⽀出及作為衍⽣⼯具交易的抵押品。
units.translation_target_text: Pay interest and repay principal on external debts, payable operating expenses and serve as collateral for derivative transactions.
units.translation_en: Pay interest and repay principal on external debts, payable operating expenses and serve as collateral for derivative transactions.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Pay interest and repay principal on external debts, payable operating expenses and serve as collateral for derivative transactions.

units.source_text: 鑑於滙豐控股已簽發與其附屬公司有關的信貸相關承諾與擔保及類似合約，所以亦須承擔或有流動資⾦風險。集團僅於仔細考慮滙豐控股為該等承
units.translation_target_text: HSBC Holdings is also subject to contingent liquidity risk as it has issued credit-related commitments and guarantees and similar contracts in relation to its subsidiaries. The Group only considers HSBC Holdings’ commitment to these undertakings carefully.
units.translation_en: HSBC Holdings is also subject to contingent liquidity risk as it has issued credit-related commitments and guarantees and similar contracts in relation to its subsidiaries. The Group only considers HSBC Holdings’ commitment to these undertakings carefully.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: HSBC Holdings is also subject to contingent liquidity risk as it has issued credit-related commitments and guarantees and similar contracts in relation to its subsidiaries. The Group only considers HSBC Holdings’ commitment to these undertakings carefully.

units.source_text: 諾及擔保提供融資的能⼒，以及出現融資需要的可能性後，⽅會作出該等承諾及擔保。
units.translation_target_text: Such commitments and guarantees will be made only after confirming Novo Guarantee's ability to provide financing and the possibility of financing needs.
units.translation_en: Such commitments and guarantees will be made only after confirming Novo Guarantee's ability to provide financing and the possibility of financing needs.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Such commitments and guarantees will be made only after confirming Novo Guarantee's ability to provide financing and the possibility of financing needs.

units.source_text: 滙豐控股⼀直積極管理來⾃旗下附屬公司之現⾦流，使控股公司層⾯持有的現⾦達致最為合適的⽔平。於2025年，集團的重要附屬公司概無於派付
units.translation_target_text: HSBC Holdings has been actively managing cash flow from its subsidiaries to achieve the most appropriate level of cash held at the holding company level. In 2025, none of the Group’s significant subsidiaries will pay
units.translation_en: HSBC Holdings has been actively managing cash flow from its subsidiaries to achieve the most appropriate level of cash held at the holding company level. In 2025, none of the Group’s significant subsidiaries will pay

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: HSBC Holdings has been actively managing cash flow from its subsidiaries to achieve the most appropriate level of cash held at the holding company level. In 2025, none of the Group’s significant subsidiaries will pay

units.source_text: 股息或償還貸款⽅⾯經歷任何重⼤限制，此情況符合集團的資本計劃。此外，⽬前亦未預⾒在重要附屬公司已計劃的股息或派付⽅⾯會有限制。然
units.translation_target_text: Experience any significant restrictions on dividends or loan repayments consistent with the Group's capital plan. In addition, no restrictions on planned dividends or payments by material subsidiaries are currently foreseen. Ran
units.translation_en: Experience any significant restrictions on dividends or loan repayments consistent with the Group's capital plan. In addition, no restrictions on planned dividends or payments by material subsidiaries are currently foreseen. Ran

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Experience any significant restrictions on dividends or loan repayments consistent with the Group's capital plan. In addition, no restrictions on planned dividends or payments by material subsidiaries are currently foreseen. Ran

units.source_text: ⽽，附屬公司向滙豐控股派付股息或貸出款項的能⼒，取決於多項因素，其中包括所屬地區的監管規定資本⽔平及銀⾏業規定、外匯管制、法定儲
units.translation_target_text: However, the ability of subsidiaries to pay dividends or make loans to HSBC Holdings depends on a number of factors, including regulatory capital levels and banking regulations in the region, foreign exchange controls, statutory reserve requirements and
units.translation_en: However, the ability of subsidiaries to pay dividends or make loans to HSBC Holdings depends on a number of factors, including regulatory capital levels and banking regulations in the region, foreign exchange controls, statutory reserve requirements and

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: However, the ability of subsidiaries to pay dividends or make loans to HSBC Holdings depends on a number of factors, including regulatory capital levels and banking regulations in the region, foreign exchange controls, statutory reserve requirements and

units.source_text: 備，以及財務及營運表現。
units.translation_target_text: equipment, as well as financial and operational performance.
units.translation_en: equipment, as well as financial and operational performance.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: equipment, as well as financial and operational performance.

units.source_text: 滙豐控股⽬前有充⾜流動資⾦，符合現有及預測的需求。
units.translation_target_text: HSBC Holdings currently has sufficient liquidity to meet existing and forecast needs.
units.translation_en: HSBC Holdings currently has sufficient liquidity to meet existing and forecast needs.

layout_variants.display_en: HSBC Holdings currently has sufficient liquidity to meet existing and forecast needs.

units.translation_target_text: If the elimination criteria are met, when financial assets and financial liabilities are eliminated, the net amount will be included in the balance sheet. units.source_text: 交易對⼿與滙豐之間涉及可予對銷的風險承擔，以及現有的淨額計算總協議或近似安排僅在違責、無⼒償債或破產時有權進⾏對銷，否則不符

units.translation_en: The impact of overcollateralization is not included.

units.source_text: 「並無設有可強制執⾏淨額計算安排之⾦額」包括於當地破產法不⼀定⽀持對銷權的司法管轄區簽立的合約，以及可能尚未尋求或無法獲取能夠證
units.translation_target_text: “Amounts for which there are no enforceable netting arrangements” include contracts entered into in jurisdictions where the local insolvency laws do not necessarily support set-off rights and where a certificate of insolvency may not have been sought or cannot be obtained.
units.translation_en: “Amounts for which there are no enforceable netting arrangements” include contracts entered into in jurisdictions where the local insolvency laws do not necessarily support set-off rights and where a certificate of insolvency may not have been sought or cannot be obtained.

units.source_text: 明對銷權可強制執⾏之法律意⾒的交易。
units.translation_target_text: Transactions requiring legal advice stating that the right of set-off is enforceable.

units.source_text: 就風險管理⽽⾔，客⼾貸款的淨額設有受監控的限額，⽽相關客⼾協議須予以檢討及在有需要時進⾏更新，以確保對銷之合法權利仍屬合適。
units.translation_target_text: For risk management, the net amount of customer loans is subject to monitored limits and the relevant customer agreements are reviewed and updated where necessary to ensure that the legal rights to set off remain appropriate.
units.translation_en: For risk management, the net amount of customer loans is subject to monitored limits and the relevant customer agreements are reviewed and updated where necessary to ensure that the legal rights to set off remain appropriate.
